{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Meiyen Teia
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Meiyen Teia]] is an [[Underlord]] on the [[Path of Glacier’s Birth]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
